title.bhs: Redukovan red vožnje za vrijeme ljetnjeg školskog raspusta
title.en: Reduced Timetable During Summer School Break

description.bhs: Od 22.06.2026. godine, za vrijeme ljetnjeg školskog raspusta, primjenjivaće se redukovan broj polazaka na gradskim i prigradskim linijama. Redovni red vožnje ponovo stupa na snagu sa početkom nove školske godine.
description.en: From 2026-06-22, during the summer school break, a reduced number of departures will be in effect on urban and suburban lines. The regular timetable will resume with the start of the new school year.

description.bhs: Javni prevoz trenutno saobraća u punom kapacitetu. Od 19.01.2026. godine na svim gradskim i prigradskim linijama primjenjuje se redovni red vožnje tokom trajanja školske godine. Napomena: za vrijeme proljetnog raspusta primjenjivaće se redukovan red vožnje.
description.en: Public transport is currently operating at full capacity. From 2026-01-19, the regular timetable will apply on all urban and suburban lines during the school year. Note: a reduced timetable will be in effect during the spring break period.
